CombatExtended.AmmoCategoryDef.label: KT laser
CombatExtended.AmmoCategoryDef.description: Standard laser energy cell for UF covenant weapons.

CombatExtended.AmmoCategoryDef.label: KT focused laser
CombatExtended.AmmoCategoryDef.description: Focused laser cell with enhanced armor penetration.

CombatExtended.AmmoCategoryDef.label: KT pulse laser
CombatExtended.AmmoCategoryDef.description: Pulse laser cell with EMP effect, effective against mechanoids.

CombatExtended.AmmoCategoryDef.label: KT bolt
CombatExtended.AmmoCategoryDef.description: Rocket-propelled explosive bolt round.

CombatExtended.AmmoCategoryDef.label: KT bolt (AP)
CombatExtended.AmmoCategoryDef.description: Armor-piercing bolt round with hardened penetrator.

CombatExtended.AmmoCategoryDef.label: KT bolt (incendiary)
CombatExtended.AmmoCategoryDef.description: Incendiary bolt round that ignites on impact.

CombatExtended.AmmoCategoryDef.label: KT metal storm
CombatExtended.AmmoCategoryDef.description: Electromagnetically propelled metal slug.

CombatExtended.AmmoCategoryDef.label: KT metal storm (AP)
CombatExtended.AmmoCategoryDef.description: Armor-piercing electromagnetic slug.

CombatExtended.AmmoCategoryDef.label: KT plasma
CombatExtended.AmmoCategoryDef.description: Standard plasma cell with explosive and EMP effects.

CombatExtended.AmmoCategoryDef.label: KT plasma (focused)
CombatExtended.AmmoCategoryDef.description: Focused plasma cell for enhanced penetration.

CombatExtended.AmmoCategoryDef.label: KT plasma (overload)
CombatExtended.AmmoCategoryDef.description: Overcharged plasma cell with massive EMP burst.

CombatExtended.AmmoCategoryDef.label: KT naval HE
CombatExtended.AmmoCategoryDef.description: High-explosive naval shell for handheld ship cannon.

CombatExtended.AmmoCategoryDef.label: KT naval HEAT
CombatExtended.AmmoCategoryDef.description: Shaped-charge naval shell with enhanced armor penetration.

CombatExtended.AmmoCategoryDef.label: KT doom shell
CombatExtended.AmmoCategoryDef.description: Annihilation warhead for the Doom Launcher.

CombatExtended.AmmoCategoryDef.label: KT plasma splitter
CombatExtended.AmmoCategoryDef.description: Plasma cell that splits into multiple sub-munitions on impact.

CombatExtended.AmmoCategoryDef.label: KT plasma splitter (focused)
CombatExtended.AmmoCategoryDef.description: Focused plasma splitter cell with higher penetration, no scatter.

CombatExtended.AmmoCategoryDef.label: KT spear energy
CombatExtended.AmmoCategoryDef.description: Energy cell for the KT Spear beam weapon.

CombatExtended.AmmoCategoryDef.label: KT spear energy (AP)
CombatExtended.AmmoCategoryDef.description: Armor-piercing spear energy cell.

CombatExtended.AmmoCategoryDef.label: KT crystal round
CombatExtended.AmmoCategoryDef.description: Crystal-infused bullet that accumulates debuffs on target.

CombatExtended.AmmoCategoryDef.label: KT crystal round (AP)
CombatExtended.AmmoCategoryDef.description: Armor-piercing crystal round.

CombatExtended.AmmoCategoryDef.label: KT assassin slug
CombatExtended.AmmoCategoryDef.description: Devastating close-range slug round.

CombatExtended.AmmoCategoryDef.label: KT assassin slug (AP)
CombatExtended.AmmoCategoryDef.description: Armor-piercing assassin slug.

CombatExtended.AmmoCategoryDef.label: KT tranq dart
CombatExtended.AmmoCategoryDef.description: Tranquilizer dart for the KT sedation rifle.

CombatExtended.AmmoCategoryDef.label: KT great arrow
CombatExtended.AmmoCategoryDef.description: Oversized arrow for the Great Bow.
